<!doctype html><html lang="en"><head>
    

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>AdminDashboard / Default</title>
  <style type="text/css">/* Lab Index — color tokens.
   Nine load-bearing values. Don't add a tenth without reason.
   Source: lab-index app/globals.css (github.com/edrickwong/lab-index) */

:root {
  /* Base palette */
  --fg: #000;
  --muted: #666;
  --muted-2: #999;
  --bg: #fff;
  --bg-alt: #f5f5f5;
  --bg-soft: #fafafa;
  --border: #999;
  --border-soft: #ccc;
  --border-faint: #e6e6e6;
  --accent: #fff8a8;
  --accent-text: #000;

  /* Links */
  --link: #000;
  --link-visited: #555;

  /* Semantic status (text color only — never fills) */
  --success: #2a6f2a;
  --error: #cc2a2a;
  --warning: #8a6d00;   /* amber — AA on white; text only, like the others */

  /* Semantic aliases */
  --text-body: var(--fg);
  --text-secondary: var(--muted);
  --text-tertiary: var(--muted-2);
  --surface-page: var(--bg);
  --surface-header: var(--bg-alt);     /* table headers, filter-group headers */
  --surface-hover: var(--bg-soft);     /* input focus, quiet hovers */
  --border-primary: var(--border);     /* panel + input borders */
  --border-table: var(--border-soft);  /* table cell borders */
  --border-row: var(--border-faint);   /* list-row separators */
  --highlight: var(--accent);          /* the single accent — yellow highlight */
}

/* Lab Index — typography tokens.
   System sans only. No webfonts, by design — the wordmark IS the typography.
   13px body, 16px h1, everything weight 500 or lighter. No bold-bold. */

:root {
  --font-sans: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace; /* numeric/tabular data, code, kbd */
  --font-features: "kern", "liga", "tnum";

  /* Size scale — small, dense, document-native */
  --text-2xs: 10px;   /* pills, superscript markers */
  --text-xs: 11px;    /* table headers, meta, labels, footer */
  --text-sm: 12px;    /* table cells, nav, taglines, section headings */
  --text-base: 13px;  /* body */
  --text-lg: 16px;    /* h1, page titles, lab names */
  --text-xl: 20px;    /* rare — standalone page titles (e.g. submit) */

  /* Weights — 500 is the maximum for headings; 600 only for active states */
  --weight-regular: 400;
  --weight-medium: 500;     /* all headings */
  --weight-active: 600;     /* active filter items — "just bold it" */

  --leading: 1.4;
  --tracking-label: 0.06em; /* uppercase section / filter-group headings */
  --tracking-form-label: 0.04em;
}

/* Lab Index — spacing, borders, layout tokens.
   Hairline borders, no rounding, no shadows. Boxes are boxes. */

:root {
  /* Spacing scale (tight, table-density) */
  --space-1: 2px;
  --space-2: 4px;
  --space-3: 6px;
  --space-4: 8px;
  --space-5: 10px;
  --space-6: 12px;
  --space-7: 16px;
  --space-8: 24px;
  --space-9: 48px;

  /* Cell padding — the workhorse: 5px 10px */
  --pad-cell-y: 5px;
  --pad-cell-x: 10px;

  /* Borders — always 1px solid. NEVER rounded. */
  --border-w: 1px;
  --radius: 0;          /* load-bearing zero. Do not change. */

  /* Shadows — none. Token exists so nobody invents one. */
  --shadow: none;

  /* Layout */
  --site-max-width: 1240px;
  --site-pad: 24px;
  --sidebar-width: 240px;
  --layout-gap: 24px;
  --measure: 720px;     /* max-width for prose + profile tables */
}

/* Lab Index — layering (z-index) scale.
   There is no elevation — nothing floats, nothing casts a shadow.
   Stacking order is the only "above", and it is borrowed briefly:
   every layered surface is a 1px-bordered white box that sits flat
   on the page the moment it appears. Use these tokens; never invent
   a z-index inline. */

:root {
  --z-base: 0;        /* @kind other */ /* normal document flow */
  --z-sticky: 10;     /* @kind other */ /* sticky table headers */
  --z-dropdown: 20;   /* @kind other */ /* menus, combobox lists, multiselect panels */
  --z-drawer: 30;     /* @kind other */ /* side panels (and their backdrop) */
  --z-modal: 40;      /* @kind other */ /* dialogs (and their backdrop) */
  --z-popover: 50;    /* @kind other */ /* popovers, tooltips — may appear above modals */
  --z-toast: 60;      /* @kind other */ /* toast stack — always on top */
}

/* Lab Index — element defaults.
   The site reads like a printed reference book that lives in a browser. */

* { box-sizing: border-box; }

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--fg);
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  line-height: var(--leading);
  font-feature-settings: var(--font-features);
}

h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); }

a {
  color: var(--link);
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-thickness: 1px;
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
}

a:hover { color: var(--fg); text-decoration-thickness: 2px; }

a:visited { color: var(--link-visited); }

/* Keyboard focus — the one universal state. 2px black outline, offset 1px.
   Mouse focus on inputs keeps the quiet bg-soft change; keyboards get the ring. */

:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--fg);
  outline-offset: 1px;
}

/* Monospace is for data, not decoration: code, kbd, tabular payloads. */

code, kbd, pre, samp { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-sm); }

code { background: var(--bg-alt); padding: 0 3px; }

pre code { background: none; padding: 0; }

/* Lab Index — the component classes. Adapted verbatim from the production
   app/globals.css (github.com/edrickwong/lab-index). React components in
   this design system are thin wrappers over these classes. */

/* ---------- Page shell ---------- */

.site {
  max-width: var(--site-max-width);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: var(--site-pad);
}

.header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin: 0 0 4px;
}

.header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: var(--text-lg); font-weight: var(--weight-medium); }

.header h1 a { color: var(--fg); text-decoration: none; }

.header h1 a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.header nav { font-size: var(--text-sm); color: var(--muted); display: flex; gap: 4px; }

.header nav a {
  padding: 1px 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg);
}

.header nav a:hover { border-color: var(--fg); }

.header nav a.active { font-weight: var(--weight-active); border-color: var(--fg); }

.tagline { color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-sm); margin: 0 0 16px; }

.layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: var(--sidebar-width) minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: var(--layout-gap);
  align-items: start;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

.footer {
  margin-top: 48px;
  padding-top: 10px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
}

.footer a { color: var(--muted); }

.footer a:hover { color: var(--fg); }

/* ---------- Filter sidebar ---------- */

.filter-group {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  background: var(--bg);
}

.filter-group h3 {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  color: var(--muted);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
}

.filter-group .filter-search {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 5px 10px;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  display: block;
}

.filter-group .filter-search:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

.filter-group ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; }

.filter-group li {
  padding: 2px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-faint);
}

.filter-group li:last-child { border-bottom: 0; }

.filter-group li a { display: block; color: var(--fg); text-decoration: none; padding: 1px 0; }

.filter-group li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.filter-group li a.active { font-weight: var(--weight-active); }

.filter-group li.clear a { color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; }

.filter-group .filter-count { color: var(--muted-2); font-size: var(--text-2xs); margin-left: 4px; }

.search-form { margin-bottom: 12px; }

.searchbox {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-base);
}

.searchbox:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

.results-info { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 8px; }

/* ---------- Tables ---------- */

table.data {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
}

table.data th, table.data td {
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  padding: var(--pad-cell-y) var(--pad-cell-x);
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: baseline;
}

table.data th {
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
}

td.num, th.num {
  text-align: right;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

td.rank {
  width: 36px;
  text-align: right;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
}

td.tag { color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.fact-table {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 600px;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  margin: 0 0 18px;
}

.fact-table th, .fact-table td {
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  padding: 5px 10px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: baseline;
}

.fact-table th {
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  color: var(--muted);
  width: 160px;
}

/* ---------- Pills & tags ---------- */

.pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0 5px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  background: var(--bg);
  margin-left: 4px;
  vertical-align: 1px;
  border-radius: 0;
  text-transform: lowercase;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.pill.confirmed { border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.pill.reported { color: var(--muted); }

.pill.rumored { background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.pill.estimated { color: var(--muted-2); font-style: italic; }

.pill.new { background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.pill.updated { border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.path-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  padding: 1px 7px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  margin-right: 6px;
}

.profile-link {
  color: var(--muted-2);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  vertical-align: 1px;
  padding: 0 2px;
}

.profile-link:hover { color: var(--fg); text-decoration: none; }

/* ---------- Valuation rendering ---------- */

.val { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

.val-confirmed { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); }

.val-reported  { /* default — black, regular */ }

.val-rumored   { font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); }

.val-estimated { font-style: italic; color: var(--muted-2); }

.val-rumored::after,
.val-estimated::after {
  content: "*";
  font-size: 10px;
  font-style: normal;
  color: var(--muted-2);
  margin-left: 1px;
  vertical-align: super;
}

.val-confirmed::after {
  content: "✓";
  font-size: 9px;
  color: var(--muted-2);
  margin-left: 2px;
  vertical-align: super;
  font-weight: 400;
}

/* ---------- Section headings & text utilities ---------- */

h2.section, h3.section {
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  margin: 24px 0 8px;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
}

.muted { color: var(--muted); }

.muted-2 { color: var(--muted-2); }

.small { font-size: var(--text-xs); }

/* ---------- Forms ---------- */

form.submit-form { max-width: 600px; }

form.submit-form label,
.form-label {
  display: block;
  margin: 10px 0 3px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-form-label);
}

form.submit-form input[type="text"],
form.submit-form input[type="url"],
form.submit-form input[type="email"],
form.submit-form textarea,
form.submit-form select,
.input, .select, .textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

form.submit-form input:focus, form.submit-form textarea:focus,
.input:focus, .textarea:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

form.submit-form textarea, .textarea { min-height: 80px; resize: vertical; }

.select { border-radius: 0; }

.checkbox-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  margin: 4px 0;
}

.checkbox-row input[type="checkbox"],
.checkbox-row input[type="radio"] { margin: 0; accent-color: #000; }

form.submit-form button { margin-top: 14px; }

/* ---------- Buttons ---------- */

.btn {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  background: var(--fg);
  color: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.btn:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--fg); border-color: var(--fg); }

.btn-secondary {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--muted);
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--fg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--fg); }

.btn-sm {
  padding: 0 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--fg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.btn-sm:hover { border-color: var(--fg); }

.btn[disabled], .btn-secondary[disabled], .btn-sm[disabled] {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.linklike {
  display: inline;
  padding: 0;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  font: inherit;
  color: var(--link);
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-thickness: 1px;
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.linklike:hover { color: var(--fg); text-decoration-thickness: 2px; }

/* ---------- Change feed ---------- */

.feed-item {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-top: 0;
}

.feed-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

.feed-item .feed-meta { color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.feed-item .feed-title { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); }

/* ---------- Notices (success / error text — never filled banners) ---------- */

.notice-success { color: var(--success); }

.notice-error { color: var(--error); }

/* Lab Index — extended component classes (inputs, data display, navigation).
   Same rules as classes.css: hairline 1px borders, zero radius, zero shadow,
   zero animation, system sans, 5px/10px density. Boxes are boxes. */

/* ---------- Inputs: affixes & character count ---------- */

.input-affix {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  width: 100%;
}

.input-affix > input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 0;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  background: transparent;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

.input-affix > input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

.input-affix .affix {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 8px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--muted);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
}

.input-affix .affix.prefix { border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

.input-affix .affix.suffix { border-left: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

.char-count {
  display: block;
  text-align: right;
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  color: var(--muted-2);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.char-count.over { color: var(--error); }

.field-help { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); margin: 3px 0 0; }

.field-error { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--error); margin: 3px 0 0; }

.field-required { color: var(--muted); }

.input[aria-invalid="true"], .textarea[aria-invalid="true"],
.input.invalid, .textarea.invalid { border-color: var(--error); }

.input[readonly], .textarea[readonly] { background: var(--bg-soft); color: var(--muted); }

.input[disabled], .textarea[disabled], .select[disabled] { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

/* ---------- Number input with steppers ---------- */

.num-input {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
}

.num-input input {
  width: 64px;
  border: 0;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  text-align: right;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  -moz-appearance: textfield;
  appearance: textfield;
}

.num-input input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
.num-input input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; }

.num-input input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

.num-input button {
  width: 22px;
  border: 0;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--fg);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
}

.num-input button:hover { background: var(--bg-alt); }

.num-input button:disabled { color: var(--muted-2); cursor: not-allowed; }

/* ---------- Toggle / segmented control ---------- */

.segmented { display: inline-flex; }

.segmented button {
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-left-width: 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.segmented button:first-child { border-left-width: 1px; }

.segmented button:hover { border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.segmented button[aria-pressed="true"], .segmented button.active {
  font-weight: var(--weight-active);
  color: var(--fg);
  border-color: var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
}

.segmented button:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

/* When an active segment follows an inactive one, its dark left edge must win. */

.segmented button[aria-pressed="true"] + button, .segmented button.active + button { border-left-color: var(--fg); }

/* ---------- Slider ---------- */

.slider-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; max-width: 360px; }

.slider-row input[type="range"] {
  flex: 1;
  accent-color: #000;
  margin: 0;
  height: 16px;
}

.slider-row .slider-value {
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  min-width: 36px;
  text-align: right;
}

/* ---------- Date / time ---------- */

.date-input {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.date-input:focus { outline: none; background: var(--bg-soft); }

.date-range { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }

.date-range .sep { color: var(--muted-2); }

/* ---------- File uploader ---------- */

.file-drop {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 14px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--muted);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.file-drop:hover, .file-drop.over { border-color: var(--fg); background: var(--bg-soft); color: var(--fg); }

.file-list { list-style: none; margin: 6px 0 0; padding: 0; }

.file-list li {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 3px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-faint);
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

.file-list .file-size { color: var(--muted-2); font-size: var(--text-xs); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

.file-list .file-status { margin-left: auto; font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); }

.file-list .file-status.error { color: var(--error); }

.file-list .file-remove {
  border: 0; background: none; padding: 0 2px; font: inherit;
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer;
}

.file-list .file-remove:hover { color: var(--fg); }

/* ---------- Combobox / multiselect dropdown panels ---------- */

.combo { position: relative; max-width: 280px; }

.combo-list {
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  margin-top: -1px;            /* share the hairline */
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  z-index: var(--z-dropdown);
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.combo-list li {
  padding: 3px 8px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-faint);
}

.combo-list li:last-child { border-bottom: 0; }

.combo-list li:hover, .combo-list li[aria-selected="true"] { background: var(--bg-alt); }

.combo-list li.empty { color: var(--muted-2); cursor: default; }

.combo-list li.empty:hover { background: none; }

.combo-list li .check { float: right; color: var(--muted); }

.multi-trigger {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 100%;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.multi-trigger:hover { border-color: var(--fg); }

.multi-count {
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  padding: 0 5px;
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

/* ---------- Filter tokens & filtered search ---------- */

.filter-token {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 4px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0 2px 0 5px;
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  background: var(--bg);
}

.filter-token .token-key { color: var(--muted); }

.filter-token .token-remove {
  border: 0; background: none; font: inherit; font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; padding: 0 3px;
}

.filter-token .token-remove:hover { color: var(--fg); background: var(--bg-alt); }

.filtered-search {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 3px 6px;
  background: var(--bg);
}

.filtered-search input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 120px;
  border: 0;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  padding: 2px 0;
  background: transparent;
}

.filtered-search input:focus { outline: none; }

.filtered-search:focus-within { background: var(--bg-soft); }

/* ---------- Fieldset & validation summary ---------- */

fieldset.fieldset {
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  padding: 10px 12px 12px;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
}

fieldset.fieldset legend {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  padding: 0 6px;
}

.form-summary {
  border: 1px solid var(--error);
  padding: 8px 10px;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

.form-summary .summary-title { color: var(--error); font-weight: var(--weight-medium); margin: 0 0 4px; }

.form-summary ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 18px; }

.form-summary li { margin: 1px 0; }

/* ---------- Data table extensions ---------- */

table.data.zebra tbody tr:nth-child(even) td { background: var(--bg-soft); }

table.data.dense th, table.data.dense td { padding: 2px 8px; font-size: var(--text-xs); }

table.data.sticky-header thead th { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: var(--z-sticky); }

table.data tbody tr.selected td { background: var(--bg-alt); }

table.data th.sortable { padding: 0; }

table.data th.sortable button {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  background: none;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-align: inherit;
  padding: var(--pad-cell-y) var(--pad-cell-x);
  cursor: pointer;
}

table.data th.sortable button:hover { color: var(--fg); }

table.data th.sortable .sort-mark { color: var(--muted-2); margin-left: 3px; font-size: var(--text-2xs); }

table.data th.sortable[aria-sort] button { color: var(--fg); font-weight: var(--weight-active); }

table.data td.checkbox-cell, table.data th.checkbox-cell { width: 24px; text-align: center; }

table.data td.checkbox-cell input, table.data th.checkbox-cell input { margin: 0; accent-color: #000; }

table.data tr.expanded-row > td {
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  padding: 8px 12px;
}

table.data .expand-toggle {
  border: 0; background: none; font: inherit; font-size: var(--text-xs);
  cursor: pointer; padding: 0 2px; color: var(--muted);
}

table.data .expand-toggle:hover { color: var(--fg); }

.table-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}

.table-toolbar .toolbar-spacer { flex: 1; }

.batch-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  padding: 4px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  margin: 0 0 8px;
}

.batch-bar .batch-count { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

.batch-bar .batch-cancel { margin-left: auto; }

/* ---------- Structured / definition list ---------- */

dl.structured {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 160px 1fr;
  margin: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-bottom: 0;
  max-width: 600px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

dl.structured dt {
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  padding: 5px 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
}

dl.structured dd { margin: 0; padding: 5px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

/* ---------- Lists (prose) ---------- */

ul.plain-list, ol.plain-list { margin: 0 0 12px; padding-left: 20px; font-size: var(--text-base); }

ul.plain-list li, ol.plain-list li { margin: 2px 0; }

ul.plain-list { list-style: square; }

/* square bullets — boxes are boxes */

/* ---------- Tile (the bordered box; "cards don't exist") ---------- */

.tile { border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); margin: 0 0 12px; }

.tile-header {
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  color: var(--muted);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
}

.tile-body { padding: 8px 10px; font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.tile.clickable { cursor: pointer; }

.tile.clickable:hover { border-color: var(--fg); }

.tile.selected { border-color: var(--fg); }

.tile.selected .tile-header { border-bottom-color: var(--fg); background: var(--bg-alt); }

/* ---------- Accordion (native details) ---------- */

.accordion { border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); border-bottom: 0; max-width: 600px; }

.accordion details { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

.accordion summary {
  list-style: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 5px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

.accordion summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }

.accordion summary::before { content: "▸"; color: var(--muted-2); margin-right: 6px; font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.accordion details[open] summary::before { content: "▾"; }

.accordion summary:hover { background: var(--bg-soft); }

.accordion .accordion-body { padding: 0 10px 8px 24px; font-size: var(--text-sm); }

/* ---------- Tree view ---------- */

.tree, .tree ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.tree ul { padding-left: 16px; border-left: 1px solid var(--border-faint); margin-left: 5px; }

.tree li { padding: 1px 0; }

.tree .tree-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; }

.tree .tree-toggle {
  border: 0; background: none; padding: 0; font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted-2); cursor: pointer; width: 12px;
}

.tree .tree-toggle:hover { color: var(--fg); }

.tree .tree-leaf { width: 12px; display: inline-block; }

.tree .tree-label.selected { font-weight: var(--weight-active); }

/* ---------- Avatar (initials in a bordered square) ---------- */

.avatar {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  color: var(--fg);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.avatar.sm { width: 18px; height: 18px; font-size: 8px; }

.avatar-stack { display: inline-flex; }

.avatar-stack .avatar { margin-left: -1px; }

/* collapse shared hairlines */

.avatar-stack .avatar-more { background: var(--bg); color: var(--muted); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

/* ---------- Code block, kbd, copy ---------- */

.code-block {
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  max-width: 720px;
}

.code-block pre {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.code-block .code-copy { position: absolute; top: 4px; right: 4px; }

kbd {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  padding: 0 4px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  line-height: 1.5;
  vertical-align: baseline;
}

/* ---------- Big-number stat ---------- */

.stat { display: inline-block; min-width: 110px; }

.stat .stat-label {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
}

.stat .stat-value {
  font-size: var(--text-xl);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.stat .stat-detail { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); }

.stat-row { display: flex; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.stat-row.boxed { gap: 0; }

.stat-row.boxed .stat { border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); padding: 8px 12px; margin-left: -1px; }

.stat-row.boxed .stat:first-child { margin-left: 0; }

/* ---------- Tabs ---------- */

.tabs-line { display: flex; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); margin: 0 0 12px; }

.tabs-line a, .tabs-line button {
  border: 0; background: none; font: inherit; font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
  padding: 3px 0 4px;
  margin-bottom: -1px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
}

.tabs-line a:hover, .tabs-line button:hover { color: var(--fg); border-bottom-color: var(--border); }

.tabs-line .active {
  color: var(--fg);
  font-weight: var(--weight-active);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--fg);
}

.tabs-line .tab-count { color: var(--muted-2); font-size: var(--text-xs); margin-left: 3px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

.tabs-contained { display: flex; margin: 0 0 12px; }

.tabs-contained a, .tabs-contained button {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-left-width: 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  font: inherit; font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
  padding: 2px 10px;
}

.tabs-contained a:first-child, .tabs-contained button:first-child { border-left-width: 1px; }

.tabs-contained .active {
  color: var(--fg);
  font-weight: var(--weight-active);
  border-color: var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
}

.tabs-contained .active + a, .tabs-contained .active + button { border-left-color: var(--fg); }

/* ---------- Inline nav (middot-separated), TOC, skip link ---------- */

.inline-nav { font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.inline-nav .sep { color: var(--muted-2); margin: 0 5px; }

.inline-nav .active { font-weight: var(--weight-active); text-decoration: none; }

.toc { font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.toc .toc-title {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  color: var(--muted);
  margin: 0 0 4px;
}

.toc ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

.toc ul ul { padding-left: 12px; }

.toc li { padding: 1px 0; }

.toc a { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; }

.toc a:hover { color: var(--fg); text-decoration: underline; }

.toc a.active { color: var(--fg); font-weight: var(--weight-active); }

.skip-link {
  position: absolute;
  left: -9999px;
  top: 0;
  z-index: var(--z-toast);
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 2px solid var(--fg);
  padding: 4px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--fg);
}

.skip-link:focus { left: 8px; top: 8px; }

/* Lab Index — feedback & overlay classes.
   Nothing floats: layered surfaces are flat 1px-bordered white boxes that
   appear instantly (no fades, no slides) and stack by tokens/layers.css.
   Status is colored text, never a filled banner. */

/* ---------- Inline notification ---------- */

.notice-box {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  max-width: 720px;
}

.notice-box .notice-kind { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); white-space: nowrap; }

.notice-box.info .notice-kind { color: var(--fg); }

.notice-box.success { border-color: var(--success); }

.notice-box.success .notice-kind { color: var(--success); }

.notice-box.warning { border-color: var(--warning); }

.notice-box.warning .notice-kind { color: var(--warning); }

.notice-box.error { border-color: var(--error); }

.notice-box.error .notice-kind { color: var(--error); }

.notice-box .notice-body { flex: 1; }

.notice-box .notice-action { white-space: nowrap; }

.dismiss {
  border: 0; background: none; font: inherit; font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; padding: 0 3px; line-height: 1;
}

.dismiss:hover { color: var(--fg); background: var(--bg-alt); }

/* ---------- Banner / broadcast ---------- */

.banner {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  padding: 5px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 10px;
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}

.banner.global { border-color: var(--fg); background: var(--bg-alt); }

.banner .banner-body { flex: 1; }

/* ---------- Toast ---------- */

.toast-stack {
  position: fixed;
  top: 12px;
  right: 12px;
  z-index: var(--z-toast);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
  width: 300px;
}

.toast {
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: baseline;
}

.toast .toast-kind { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); white-space: nowrap; }

.toast.success .toast-kind { color: var(--success); }

.toast.warning .toast-kind { color: var(--warning); }

.toast.error .toast-kind { color: var(--error); }

.toast .toast-body { flex: 1; }

.toast .toast-meta { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); }

/* ---------- Modal ---------- */

.modal-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); /* the page greys itself out — no dark scrim */
  z-index: var(--z-modal);
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 10vh 16px 16px;
}

.modal {
  border: 1px solid var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg);
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 480px;
  max-height: 80vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.modal.sm { max-width: 360px; }

.modal.lg { max-width: 720px; }

.modal-title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
}

.modal-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  color: var(--muted);
}

.modal.danger .modal-title h2 { color: var(--error); }

.modal-body { padding: 12px; font-size: var(--text-base); overflow-y: auto; }

.modal-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
}

.btn-danger {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--error);
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--error);
  font: inherit;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.btn-danger:hover { background: var(--error); color: var(--bg); }

.btn-danger[disabled] { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

/* ---------- Drawer / side panel ---------- */

.drawer-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
  z-index: var(--z-drawer);
}

.drawer {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  right: 0;
  width: 360px;
  max-width: 90vw;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--fg);
  background: var(--bg);
  z-index: var(--z-drawer);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.drawer.left { right: auto; left: 0; border-left: 0; border-right: 1px solid var(--fg); }

.drawer.lg { width: 480px; }

.drawer .drawer-title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
}

.drawer .drawer-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  color: var(--muted);
}

.drawer .drawer-body { padding: 12px; font-size: var(--text-base); overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }

.drawer .drawer-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

/* ---------- Popover & tooltip ---------- */

.popover-anchor { position: relative; display: inline-block; }

.popover {
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  left: 0;
  margin-top: 2px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  min-width: 180px;
  max-width: 300px;
  z-index: var(--z-popover);
}

.popover.right { left: auto; right: 0; }

.has-tooltip { position: relative; }

.tooltip {
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 100%;
  left: 0;
  margin-bottom: 3px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 2px 6px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
  font-style: normal;
  color: var(--fg);
  white-space: nowrap;
  max-width: 280px;
  z-index: var(--z-popover);
}

.has-tooltip:hover .tooltip, .has-tooltip:focus-visible .tooltip { display: block; }

.tooltip-term {
  text-decoration: underline dotted;
  text-decoration-color: var(--muted-2);
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
  cursor: help;
}

/* ---------- Progress ---------- */

.progress { max-width: 360px; }

.progress .progress-label {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  margin: 0 0 3px;
}

.progress .progress-value { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--fg); }

.progress .progress-track { border: 1px solid var(--fg); height: 10px; background: var(--bg); }

.progress .progress-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--fg); }

.progress.thin .progress-track { border: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--border-soft); }

.progress-ascii { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-sm); letter-spacing: 0; }

/* ---------- Stepper / progress indicator ---------- */

.stepper { display: flex; gap: 0; list-style: none; margin: 0 0 16px; padding: 0; font-size: var(--text-sm); flex-wrap: wrap; }

.stepper li { display: flex; align-items: baseline; }

.stepper li + li::before { content: "—"; color: var(--muted-2); margin: 0 10px; }

.stepper .step-num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-right: 4px; color: var(--muted); }

.stepper .done { color: var(--muted); }

.stepper .done .step-check { color: var(--success); margin-right: 4px; font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.stepper .current { font-weight: var(--weight-active); }

.stepper .future { color: var(--muted-2); }

/* ---------- Loading & skeleton ---------- */

.loading-text { color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.loading-page { padding: 48px 0; text-align: center; color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.skeleton { background: var(--bg-alt); display: block; }

/* solid rectangle, no shimmer */

.skeleton-text .skeleton { height: 9px; margin: 5px 0; }

.skeleton-text .skeleton:last-child { width: 60%; }

/* ---------- Empty state ---------- */

.empty-state { padding: 24px 0; max-width: 480px; }

.empty-state .empty-title { font-size: var(--text-base); font-weight: var(--weight-medium); margin: 0 0 4px; }

.empty-state .empty-body { font-size: var(--text-sm); color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 8px; }

.empty-state.boxed { border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); padding: 18px; text-align: center; max-width: 600px; }

/* ---------- Error page ---------- */

.error-page { padding: 48px 0; max-width: 480px; }

.error-page .error-code {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking-label);
  margin: 0 0 6px;
}

.error-page h1 { font-size: var(--text-lg); margin: 0 0 6px; }

.error-page p { font-size: var(--text-base); color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 12px; }

/* Lab Index — chart classes.
   Brutalist chart language: 1px black axes, dotted #ccc gridlines, 11px sans
   labels with tabular numerals, direct labels over legends, monochrome fills
   and SVG patterns before any color. The single accent #fff8a8 marks one
   highlighted series at most. No gradients, no rounding, no animation. */

.chart { font-size: var(--text-xs); max-width: 720px; }

.chart svg { display: block; }

.chart text {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 11px;
  fill: var(--muted);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.chart .axis-label { fill: var(--muted); }

.chart .direct-label { fill: var(--fg); }

.chart .axis-line { stroke: var(--fg); stroke-width: 1; shape-rendering: crispEdges; }

.chart .tick-line { stroke: var(--fg); stroke-width: 1; shape-rendering: crispEdges; }

.chart .grid-line { stroke: var(--border-soft); stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: 1 3; shape-rendering: crispEdges; }

.chart-title { font-size: var(--text-base); font-weight: var(--weight-medium); margin: 0; color: var(--fg); }

.chart-subtitle { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); margin: 1px 0 0; }

.chart-head { margin: 0 0 8px; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; }

.chart-head .chart-actions { margin-left: auto; display: flex; gap: 6px; }

.chart-foot { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--muted); margin: 6px 0 0; }

.chart-state { padding: 24px 0; color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-sm); }

.chart-state.error { color: var(--error); }

/* Legend — swatches are bordered squares filled with the series pattern */

.chart-legend { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 6px 0 0; font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--fg); }

.chart-legend .legend-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }

.chart-legend svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

/* Sparkline sits inline in table cells */

.sparkline { vertical-align: -2px; }

/* Table-as-chart: inline bar column inside .data tables */

.cell-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-width: 120px; }

.cell-bar .cell-bar-track { flex: 1; height: 9px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }

.cell-bar .cell-bar-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--fg); }

.cell-bar .cell-bar-value { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: var(--text-xs); white-space: nowrap; }

/* Gauge / meter — bordered linear fill, never radial */

.gauge { max-width: 280px; }

.gauge .gauge-track { border: 1px solid var(--fg); height: 14px; background: var(--bg); position: relative; }

.gauge .gauge-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--fg); }

.gauge .gauge-fill.warn { background: var(--warning); }

.gauge .gauge-fill.bad { background: var(--error); }

.gauge .gauge-marker { position: absolute; top: -3px; bottom: -3px; width: 1px; background: var(--fg); }

.gauge .gauge-scale {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  color: var(--muted-2);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  margin-top: 2px;
}

:root {
  --site-max-width: 1469px;
}

.btn, .btn-secondary { padding: 2px 10px; }

.pill.remote { border-color: var(--fg); color: var(--fg); }

.pill.onsite { color: var(--muted); }

.pill.hybrid { color: var(--muted); }

.conf-parsed { }

.conf-partial { font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); }

.conf-raw-only { font-style: italic; color: var(--muted-2); }

.conf-raw-only::after {
  content: "*";
  font-size: var(--text-2xs);
  font-style: normal;
  color: var(--muted-2);
  margin-left: 1px;

}

.tags { color: var(--muted); font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.tags .t { white-space: nowrap; }

.tags .t + .t::before { content: " · "; color: var(--muted-2); }

.line-list { display: grid; gap: 1px; }

.role-list { line-height: 1.3; }

.row-facts { color: var(--muted-2); font-size: var(--text-xs); }

.row-facts span + span::before { content: " · "; }

.raw-body {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  line-height: 1.5;
  max-width: var(--measure);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--bg-soft);
}

.raw-body a { word-break: break-word; }

.filters-sidebar { min-width: 0; }

.filters-toggle { display: none; }

.filters-content { display: contents; }

@media (max-width: 800px) {

    display: flex;

@media (max-width: 800px) {

.admin-actions {
